Name: David McCarter Jr
Designation: With almost two decades of experience at Microsoft, my recent focus has been on ensuring operational excellence as a Site Reliability Engineer within the M365 Problem Management team. By leveraging skills in incident management, Microsoft Power BI, CI/CD pipelines, and reporting pipeline engineering, the team and I have improved visibility into key business metrics and enhanced cross-team collaboration.  Dedicated to fostering relationships across operations, development, external vendors, and multiple geographic regions, the goal is to support seamless incident resolution and proactive problem management (reducing MTTD, MTTM, and MTTR). A commitment to innovation and effective communication drives the creation of impactful solutions that align with the needs of the organization and its stakeholders.I am a reliability-driven engineering leader with extensive experience delivering, operating, and improving large-scale distributed systems. I've demonstrated strong expertise in incident and problem management, automation engineering, and service reliability practices that improve uptime, resilience, and operational efficiency. I leverage data, telemetry, and disciplined processes to enhance service health and reduce operational friction. As core to my skills I bring advanced capability in automation and scripting using Python, PowerShell, and Bash to streamline incident response and infrastructure management. I possess deep service knowledge, a systems-level perspective, and a proven ability to collaborate effectively across engineering, operations, and vendor teams. I've been recognized for motivating stakeholders toward shared outcomes and translating complex technical issues into clear, actionable insights for diverse audiences.CORE COMPETENCIESIncident & Problem Management, Distributed Systems Reliability, Service Health, Monitoring, Site Reliability Engineering, Observability Engineering, Operational Excellence, Process Design, Postmortem Analysis, Metrics & Telemetry, Visualizations / Power BI, Automation Design, Cross-Team Collaboration, Linux Administration, Microsoft 365 Administration, SLI / SLO, Escalation Management, Datacenter Operations, Operational Documentation Microsoft

Name: Patrick K.
Designation:
AI-forward operations and enablement leader with a career-long record of scaling organizations, exceeding performance targets, and building governed systems that balance speed, accuracy, and human judgment. Proven track record designing and implementing AI-augmented enablement and quality frameworks, including AI governance, scorecards, and human-in-the-loop validation models that increase productivity without sacrificing trust or compliance. Highly regarded for translating emerging technologies into durable, real-world business capability—aligning AI adoption with operational goals, risk management, and organizational readiness. Thrive in fast-paced, cross-functional environments requiring clear decision-making, systems thinking, and accountability.· Award-winning leader with a 61% promotion rate for team members.

· Designed and implemented an AI-native enablement ecosystem integrating generative AI into quality, training, and operational workflows while maintaining human oversight and accuracy standards.
· Established AI governance frameworks, including scorecards, review thresholds, and escalation paths to mitigate hallucinations, misuse, and compliance risk.
· Achieved and sustained 94%+ quality compliance nationwide while deploying AI-augmented evaluation and reporting systems.
· Led enablement and operational strategy through a 300% company growth cycle, balancing automation with scalable human judgment.
· Directed cross-functional adoption of AI across sales, enablement, and operations—aligning deployment with business outcomes rather than novelty.
· Drove a 61% promotion rate for subordinates by building systems that emphasized clarity, accountability, and measurable performance improvement.

Colleagues describe me as a results-driven, adaptable, and people-focused leader who thrives in fast-paced, high-growth environments. I'm passionate about connecting with like-minded professionals to share insights and drive AI innovation.

Feel free to reach out to connect and discuss opportunities. brightwheel

Name: Anita Rao Kapur
Designation: The gap between insights and action is wider than most organizations admit. I've spent my career bridging it — building growth strategy and analytics functions across APAC that don't just produce intelligence, but shape what businesses do next.Across senior leadership roles, I've owned P&Ls, led large-scale business transformations, designed market entry strategies that unlocked significant global opportunities, and built analytics platforms used by thousands of stakeholders across regions.My approach to insight and strategy has always been automation-first. I've spent my career building systems that do the repeatable work at scale, so teams can focus on the decisions that matter - from early NLP prototypes adopted globally, to building self-serve platforms at scale, to deepening my AI strategy foundation at leading institutions. Outside my corporate work, I led the Singapore chapter of Women in Research (WIRe) and served on their global advisory board — the conversation around women in analytics and insights leadership still needs having, and I've been glad to be part of it. Airbnb
